query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "wan-streamer v0.1: end-to-end real-time interactive foundation models" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it addresses the same core mechanism (end-to-end real-time interactive foundation models) and domain (low-latency human-AI interaction) as the user's question, providing a canonical alternative implementation using GRUs and specific engineering constraints (lock-free communication, O(1) decoding) that are directly relevant to the "Wan-Streamer" follow-up research.
